dashboard.label: Sleep
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Sleep","description":"Vendor-neutral sleep — stages, efficiency, latency, HRV (Wearables data model)","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"},"input_person":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Person (temp)","options":{"token":"person","defaultValue":"*","items":[{"label":"All people","value":"*"},{"label":"P001","value":"P001"},{"label":"P002","value":"P002"}]}}},"dataSources":{"ds_sleep_contributors":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_score=* person_id="$person$" | dedup day | sort -_time | head 1 | eval "Deep Sleep"=round(sleep_contrib_deep_sleep,0), "Efficiency"=round(sleep_contrib_efficiency,0), "Latency"=round(sleep_contrib_latency,0), "REM Sleep"=round(sleep_contrib_rem_sleep,0), "Restfulness"=round(sleep_contrib_restfulness,0), "Timing"=round(sleep_contrib_timing,0), "Total Sleep"=round(sleep_contrib_total_sleep,0) | table "Deep Sleep","Efficiency","Latency","REM Sleep","Restfulness","Timing","Total Sleep" | transpose | rename column as contributor, "row 1" as score | sort -score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep score contributors"},"ds_score_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_score=* person_id="$person$" | dedup day | eval Score=sleep_score | timechart span=1d@d avg(Score) as Score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Sleep score trend"},"ds_sleep_score":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_score=* person_id="$person$" | dedup day | sort -_time | head 1 | eval score=sleep_score, scolor=case(score<60,"#E8503A",score<75,"#F4A422",true(),"#4CAF50") | table score, scolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep score — latest (gauge)"},"ds_sleep_detail":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_type="long_sleep" person_id="$person$" | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_min | sort -_time | head 1 | eval sleep_hours=round(total_sleep_min/60,1), latency_min=latency_min, bed_hours=round(time_in_bed_min/60,1), avg_hr=round(avg_hr,1), avg_hrv=round(hrv_avg,0), low_hr=round(lowest_hr,0), efficiency=efficiency_pct, ecolor=case(efficiency_pct<75,"#E8503A",efficiency_pct<85,"#F4A422",true(),"#4CAF50") | table sleep_hours, bed_hours, efficiency, latency_min, avg_hr, avg_hrv, low_hr, ecolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep detail — latest (tiles)"},"ds_duration_detail":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_type="long_sleep" person_id="$person$" | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_min | eval Deep=round(deep_min/60,2), REM=round(rem_min/60,2), Light=round(light_min/60,2), Awake=round(awake_min/60,2) | timechart span=1d@d avg(Awake) as Awake, avg(REM) as REM, avg(Light) as Light, avg(Deep) as Deep","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Sleep stage duration trend"},"ds_stage_pct":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_type="long_sleep" person_id="$person$" | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_min | sort -_time | head 1 | eval total=total_sleep_min, deep_pct=round(deep_min/total*100,0), rem_pct=round(rem_min/total*100,0), light_pct=round(light_min/total*100,0), awake_pct=round(awake_min/time_in_bed_min*100,0), deep_h=round(deep_min/60,1), rem_h=round(rem_min/60,1), light_h=round(light_min/60,1), awake_h=round(awake_min/60,1) | eval Deep=deep_h." hr (".deep_pct."%)", REM=rem_h." hr (".rem_pct."%)", Light=light_h." hr (".light_pct."%)", Awake=awake_h." hr (".awake_pct."%)", "SpO2 Avg"=tostring(round(spo2_avg,1))."%" | table Deep, REM, Light, Awake, "SpO2 Avg"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep stage % — latest"},"ds_hypnogram_v2":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_type="long_sleep" person_id="$person$" | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_min | sort -_time | head 1 | rex field=bedtime_start "T(?P<bed_h>\d{2}):(?P<bed_m>\d{2})" | eval bed_h=tonumber(bed_h), bed_m=tonumber(bed_m), bed_total_mins=(bed_h*60)+bed_m | rex field=sleep_phase_5_min max_match=0 "(?P<phases>.)" | mvexpand phases | streamstats count as idx | eval offset_min=(idx-1)*5, total_mins=bed_total_mins+offset_min, h=floor(total_mins/60) % 24, m=total_mins % 60, hh=if(h<10,"0".tostring(h),tostring(h)), mm=if(m<10,"0".tostring(m),tostring(m)), time_label=hh.":".mm, sbt=strptime(bedtime_start,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), date_label=strftime(sbt+(offset_min*60),"%a %b %d"), stage=case(phases="1","Deep",phases="2","Light",phases="3","REM",phases="4","Awake",true(),"Unknown") | where stage!="Unknown" | table offset_min, time_label, date_label, stage","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Hypnogram (stage timeline)"}},"visualizations":{"score_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalueradial","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_score"},"options":{"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","radialStrokeColor":"> primary | seriesByName('scolor') | lastPoint()","minValue":0,"maxValue":100,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"},"title":"Sleep Score"},"total_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"sleep_hours","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Total Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" hr","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('sleep_hours')","align":"left"},"title":"Total Sleep"},"bed_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"bed_hours","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Time in Bed","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" hr","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('bed_hours')","align":"left"},"title":"Time in Bed"},"efficiency_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalueradial","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('efficiency')","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","radialStrokeColor":"> primary | seriesByName('ecolor') | lastPoint()","minValue":0,"maxValue":100,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Sleep Efficiency"},"latency_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"latency_min","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Latency","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" min","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('latency_min')","align":"left"},"title":"Sleep Latency"},"avg_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Avg HR","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Avg Heart Rate"},"low_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"low_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Lowest HR","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('low_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Lowest Heart Rate"},"contributors_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_contributors"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#8B7FB0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Sleep Score Contributors"},"score_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_score_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#F5A623"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Sleep Score Trend"},"duration_trend":{"type":"splunk.area","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_duration_detail"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#EDE7DA","#A9D2EE","#5AA6E0","#3A78AF"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","yAxisTitle":"Hours","stackMode":"stacked"},"title":"Sleep Stage Duration Trend"},"hypnogram_v2":{"type":"hypnogram_viz.hypnogram","title":"Sleep Stage Timeline (most recent night)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hypnogram_v2"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","contentOpacity":0.6,"lanes":"[{"label": "Awake", "color": "#EDE7DA"}, {"label": "REM", "color": "#A9D2EE"}, {"label": "Light", "color": "#5AA6E0"}, {"label": "Deep", "color": "#3A78AF"}]"}},"deep_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Deep Sleep","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"Deep","majorColor":"#3A78AF","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('Deep')","label":"Deep Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"rem_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"REM Sleep","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"REM","majorColor":"#A9D2EE","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('REM')","label":"REM Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"light_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Light Sleep","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"Light","majorColor":"#5AA6E0","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('Light')","label":"Light Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"awake_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Awake","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"Awake","majorColor":"#EDE7DA","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('Awake')","label":"Awake","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"latest_night_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","markdown":"### About last night
- **Sleep Score / Efficiency / Latency** — overall quality, % of time in bed asleep, and minutes to fall asleep.
- **Sleep stages** — Awake / REM / Light / Deep; the hypnogram shows the order, tiles show time + % in each.
- **Contributors** — the sub-scores Oura blends into your Sleep Score.
- These panels show your **most recent night** — the latest night in the selected time range.

**Learn more:** [Oura — Sleep Score](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360025445574-Sleep-Score) · [Sleep Stages](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/11752397946003-Sleep-Stages)"}},"trends_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","markdown":"### About these trends
- **Sleep Score Trend** and **Sleep Stage Duration Trend** show how your score and stage hours change **over the selected time range** (set by the Time Range picker above).
- More timechart panels can live here as they're added.

**Learn more:** [Oura — Sleep Score](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360025445574-Sleep-Score)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp","input_person"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"Last Night"},{"layoutId":"layout_2","label":"Trends"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":920,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/wearables/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"structure":[{"item":"score_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":200,"h":190}},{"item":"efficiency_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":240,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"total_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":435,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"bed_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":630,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"latency_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":825,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"avg_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1020,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"low_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1215,"y":20,"w":205,"h":190}},{"item":"awake_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":230,"w":330,"h":130}},{"item":"rem_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":370,"y":230,"w":330,"h":130}},{"item":"light_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":720,"y":230,"w":330,"h":130}},{"item":"deep_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1070,"y":230,"w":350,"h":130}},{"item":"hypnogram_v2","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":380,"w":920,"h":300}},{"item":"contributors_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":960,"y":380,"w":460,"h":300}},{"item":"latest_night_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":700,"w":1400,"h":200}}]},"layout_2":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":530,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/wearables/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"structure":[{"item":"score_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":690,"h":300}},{"item":"duration_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":730,"y":20,"w":690,"h":300}},{"item":"trends_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":340,"w":1400,"h":170}}]}}}}
